description: You are a Climatology Data Engineer configuring tracking software for automated soil moisture satellite reception. Update the GPredict configuration for two new experimental farms by removing the obsolete 'Old_HQ' ground station and adding 'Iowa_Test_Farm' (42.0308 N, 93.6319 W, 287m altitude, weather station KAMW) and 'Nebraska_Site' (40.8258 N, 96.6817 W, 350m altitude, weather station KLNK). Configure 'Iowa_Test_Farm' as the default ground station in the application preferences. Additionally, create a tracking module named 'Drought_Monitor' to track the following satellites: NOAA 19 (33591), NOAA 20 (43013), SUOMI NPP (37849), METOP-B (38771), and METOP-C (43689). Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
